title: Mazars Comment: Very slow growth + higher than average inflation = stagflation.
section_path: Mazars Comment: Very slow growth + higher than average inflation = stagflation.
section_path_text: Mazars Comment: Very slow growth + higher than average inflation = stagflation.
summary:
Main
﻿
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this morning
The US appears to have reached a debt ceiling deal. If signed, it averts a global systemic credit event and growth takes a moderate hit. We are way past the supply-side inflation part of the problem, and have moved into the wage-price spiral.

children.title: Very slow growth + higher than average inflation = stagflation
section_path: Very slow growth + higher than average inflation = stagflation
children.section_path_text: Very slow growth + higher than average inflation = stagflation
children.summary: The US debt ceiling drama seems to be moving behind us, as a moderate President and a less-than-expected-militant House Speaker reached an accord that will only have a moderate impact on growth. It remains to be passed by the individual caucuses in the Senate and the House, but the probability of a signed deal before the 5th June x-date seems very possible - at the time of writing (large caveat, this is politics).
